name: daxelo-kinrel-server
description: Daxelo-Kinrel NestJS API Server — deployed via Coolify on Oracle Cloud VPS

databases.name: kinrel-postgres
databases.note: Using external Supabase PostgreSQL — add a Coolify PostgreSQL service only if you want a local DB instead

_notes.purpose: This file documents the intended Coolify deployment topology. Coolify's web UI is the primary configuration interface — this JSON serves as a reference and planning document.
_notes.buildPack: Nixpacks is recommended (uses nixpacks.toml). Docker build pack also works with the existing server/Dockerfile.
_notes.redis: Alternatively, use Coolify's one-click Redis service from the Service Templates library instead of defining it here.
_notes.domain: api.kinrel.app must have a DNS A record pointing to the VPS IP. Coolify auto-provisions Let's Encrypt SSL.
_notes.envVars: All environment variables must be configured through Coolify's web UI. See deploy/coolify-env-template.md for the full list.
